name: Robb's Low-Cholesterol Pumpkin Pie with Oil Pastry
recipeInstructions:
Oil Pastry:
1. Mix 1 1/3 cups all-purpose flour with 1/2 teaspoon salt.
2. In a measuring cup, add canola oil and do not stir.
3. Add water to the same cup without stirring.
4. Pour the liquid into the flour mixture and stir lightly until well combined.
5. Form the dough into a smooth ball and place between two 12-inch squares of waxed paper.
6. Roll out gently with a rolling pin until the pastry circle reaches the edges of the paper.
7. Peel off the top sheet of paper, lift the bottom sheet by opposite corners, flip over onto the 9-inch pie plate, and ease the pastry into the plate. Remove the waxed paper.
8. Trim the pastry and create a high fluted edge.
Pie Filling:
1. Preheat oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Place pumpkin in a large mixing bowl.
3. Blend egg whites, sugar, salt, and spices; stir in evaporated milk.
4. Pour filling into the unbaked pie shell.
5. Bake for 15 minutes at 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Reduce heat to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and bake an additional 45 minutes until a metal knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
